raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to express my dissatisfaction and file a formal complaint regarding unauthorized charges on my Macy 's credit card, which is serviced by Citibank. Despite reporting the fraudulent purchase to their fraud investigation department over six months ago. Macys fraud department decided that I am still responsible for this unauthorized purchase. 

An unauthorized purchase appeared on my credit card statement, and upon noticing it, I immediately reported it to your fraud investigation department. Despite my efforts and persistence, Citibank has failed to provide transparency regarding the nature of this purchase. Additionally, instead of resolving the matter, I have been directed to debt collection. 

It is frustrating that Citibank has concluded that I am responsible for the unauthorized purchase, despite my clear assertion otherwise. I urge Citibank to provide detailed information regarding the disputed transaction and to rectify the situation.
